steps.title: Connect goal to method
steps.content: The first sentence says Vega wanted to include chance and randomness in his artistic process. The next sentence describes his use of techniques that produce random, unpredictable results.

steps.title: Choose the purpose transition
steps.content: The transition should show that the technique follows from the goal. On the contrary signals opposition, In conclusion signals a summary, and Regardless signals action despite the goal. The answer is A.
